description.ko: 지구의 피부에 대한 시각적 연구인 '테라-1'은 고공에서 바라본 지질학적 형성과 생태계의 원시적이고 촉각적인 아름다움을 포착하며, 우리 행성의 자연적인 기하학적 구조를 강조합니다.
description.en: A visual study of the Earth's skin, TERRA-1 captures the raw, tactile beauty of geological formations and ecosystems from a high-altitude perspective, emphasizing the natural geometry of our planet.

prompt: Hyper-realistic satellite imagery focusing on the diverse textures of Earth's surface, featuring cracked clay of the Sahara, the intricate fractal patterns of the Amazon river delta, jagged snow-capped Himalayan peaks, and the swirling turquoise patterns of Great Barrier Reef shallow waters, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, macro-geological details, high contrast.
